metadata.sources: PChome, Momo, Yahoo, BigGo, JM-Plus, Bose TW, Jo Malone TW, Aesop TW, IKEA TW, Carousell TW scrape data
metadata.notes: new_price = current retail / official price. secondhand_price = typical Carousell TW range. Prices may fluctuate.

products.name: Marshall Kilburn II 藍牙喇叭
products.new_price_note: PChome促銷價，原價NT$14,900
products.secondhand_note: Carousell實際listing: NT$4,000 (like new)

products.name: Marshall Emberton II 藍牙喇叭
products.new_price_note: Emberton III已推出(NT$6,490)，II代清倉中，部分通路NT$5,490
products.secondhand_note: Carousell: NT$3,500(全新未拆), NT$4,300(brand new listing)

products.name: Marshall Emberton III 藍牙喇叭
products.new_price_note: JM-Plus/PChome 台灣公司貨

products.new_price_note: JM-Plus 台灣公司貨

products.name: Bose SoundLink Home 喇叭
products.new_price_note: PChome官方授權賣場，原價NT$7,990。促銷低至NT$4,800
products.secondhand_note: Carousell: NT$3,500 (like new)

products.name: Bose QC Earbuds II
products.new_price_note: 原上市價約NT$7,990-8,490，已被QC Ultra系列取代。仍有少量通路庫存
products.secondhand_note: Carousell: NT$3,000 (lightly used)

products.name: Bose QC Ultra Earbuds
products.new_price_note: JM-Plus/PChome 台灣公司貨。第二代(Ultra 2)也NT$9,500
products.secondhand_note: Carousell: NT$4,800-5,000 (like new / lightly used)

products.name: Bose SoundLink Flex II
products.new_price_note: Bose TW官網/PChome，部分通路NT$5,900
products.secondhand_note: Carousell: NT$3,600 (like new), NT$4,100-4,200 (brand new未拆)

products.name: Apple Watch SE1 (2020)
products.new_price_note: 已停產。原售價GPS 40mm NT$8,900
products.secondhand_note: Carousell: NT$2,100 (40mm GPS), NT$1,500 (44mm). 回收價極低約NT$500-1,000

products.name: Apple Watch SE2 (2022)
products.new_price_note: 已停產(被SE3取代)。米可手機館清倉價NT$6,190
products.secondhand_note: Carousell: NT$5,000 (44mm GPS, like new). 回收價約NT$1,500-2,500

products.name: Apple Watch S8 (2022)
products.new_price_note: 已停產。原售價GPS 45mm NT$13,500起
products.secondhand_note: Carousell: NT$3,800-4,500 (45mm lightly used), NT$5,000 (45mm LTE). 回收價約NT$500-1,000

products.name: Apple Watch S9
products.new_price_note: Apple TW官網起售價(GPS 41mm)。45mm GPS NT$14,900
products.secondhand_note: Carousell: NT$4,800 (45mm GPS lightly used). 已有S10/S11，S9二手價持續下降

products.name: Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 Classic
products.new_price_note: 已停產(現為Watch 8 Classic)。原售價43mm BT NT$11,990, 47mm BT NT$12,990
products.secondhand_note: Carousell: NT$3,600 (43mm R950 lightly used), NT$4,900 (47mm LTE lightly used)

products.name: Vivienne Westwood 軍牌項鍊 (Dog Tag Necklace)
products.new_price_note: 估計NT$4,500-6,500。海外官網約USD$155-250，台灣代購/專櫃加價。SSENSE約USD$155
products.secondhand_note: Carousell: NT$1,500 (lightly used)

products.name: Vivienne Westwood 絲巾
products.new_price_note: 範圍大：小方巾NT$480-1,200，大絲巾NT$2,000-5,000。日本限定純棉方巾較便宜
products.secondhand_note: Carousell: NT$500 (brand new with receipt). 二手方巾非常便宜

products.name: Jo Malone 鼠尾草與海鹽 30ml
products.new_price_note: 專櫃價NT$2,950。水貨/平行輸入約NT$2,470

products.name: Jo Malone 鼠尾草與海鹽 100ml

products.name: Jo Malone 英國梨與小蒼蘭 50ml

products.name: Dior Gris Dior 蒙田大道香氛 50ml

products.name: Nespresso Pixie 膠囊咖啡機

products.name: Malin+Goetz Cannabis 大麻草淡香精

products.name: 落地燈 品牌款

products.name: 藍牙喇叭 二手市場總覽 (台灣)
products.market_note: Carousell台灣藍牙喇叭二手市場活躍。Marshall最熱門，約新品6-7折。Bose約7-8折。JBL折扣較深約5-6折。
